sb_prompt: DISCUSS POSSIBLE CHANGES IN THE WAY TRIALS BY JURY ARE CONDUCTED.     FOR EXAMPLE
turns: I'm doing well, thank you for asking. How about yourself?
I am also doing pretty good. Thanks for asking!
That's great to hear! What brings you up today?
Well, I was just thinking about the trial by jury system and all the possible changes that could be made to improve it. Have you ever thought about that before?
Yes, I think it would be interesting to discuss potential improvements to the trial

ury system. One change that comes to mind is using technology such as video conferencing or virtual reality to make the process more efficient and accessible for those who cannot physically attend the trial. Do you agree or disagree with this idea?
completely agree. Technology has advanced so much over the years and there’s really no reason why trials can’t take advantage of that. It could help speed things along and save time and money.
